title: carex supina var. supina
intro: Carex supina var. supina, also known as the roadside sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Carex supina var. supina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and traditional healing practices.
